overview: A premium luxury 3D animated portfolio website for Faces by Sakshi, a professional bridal and celebrity makeup artist studio based in Noida. Features stunning 3D animations, pinkish-dark theme, floating contact buttons, Indian testimonials, FAQ, services showcase, and location map.
features: Hero section with 3D animated background and floating particles
Services showcase with 3D tilt hover effects
Why Choose Us with animated stats
Indian testimonials carousel with star ratings
Pinkish dark luxury theme with blurry glow effects
